user_report.requested_change: Align the section's horizontal margin with the section above it.

local_verification.app_container: third_party/typeduck-web/source/src/App.tsx renders the playground inside <main className="m-auto p-8 max-w-7xl">.
local_verification.above_content: Toolbar, schema switcher, status strip, textarea, inspector, and candidate panel render directly in the main container.
local_verification.settings_container: third_party/typeduck-web/source/src/Preferences.tsx wraps IME Settings in <section className="mx-auto max-w-6xl">.
local_verification.likely_cause: The nested centered max-w-6xl settings wrapper is narrower than the max-w-7xl main content, causing different left/right margins from the preceding playground section.

plan_change: Track as M25-DOGFOOD-10. The implementation should remove or replace the nested preferences width constraint so IME Settings aligns with the content above it while preserving the settings grid and responsive behavior.
